articles.headline: Nine out of ten African teams secure World Cup round of 32 berth
articles.description: Africa completed a historic World Cup group stage on Sunday, sending nine out of 10 teams to the round of 32 after Congo and Algeria secured knockout berths.

images.name: South Africa celeb vs South Korea [1296x729]
images.caption: South Africa celebrate Thapelo Maseko's goal against South Korea.
images.alt: Thapelo Maseko #12 of South Africa celebrates with teammates after scoring the team's first goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match between South Africa and Korea Republic at Monterrey Stadium on June 24, 2026 in Guadalupe, Mexico.
images.credit: Julian Finney - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

articles.headline: FIFA World Cup 2026 stats: Messi sets another World Cup record; Ronaldo second with 25; Kane's 11 best for England; Modric record 40
articles.description: ESPN's By The Numbers brings you best stats from the World Cup action on June 27.

images.name: Lionel Messi celebrates, Jordan vs Argentina, 2026 FIFA World Cup [1296x729]
images.alt: Lionel Messi #10 of Argentina celebrates scoring his team's third goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group J match between Jordan and Argentina at Dallas Stadium on June 27, 2026 in Arlington, Texas.
images.credit: Ryan Pierse - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Modric celeb [1296x729]
images.caption: Luka Modric has led Croatia to the knockout stage for the third consecutive World Cup.
images.alt: Luka Modric #10 of Croatia reacts after the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group L match between Croatia and Ghana on June 27th, 2026 at Philadelphia Stadium in Philadelphia, PA
images.credit: Terence Lewis/Icon Sportswire via Getty Images

images.name: Kane celeb vs Panama [1296x729]
images.caption: Harry Kane celebrates his record-breaking goal in England's win over Panama.
images.alt: Harry Kane of England celebrates 2nd goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group L match between Panama and England at New York New Jersey Stadium on June 27, 2026 in East Rutherford, New Jersey

images.name: Ronaldo [1296x729]
images.credit: (Photo by Peter Joneleit/Icon Sportswire via Getty Images)

images.name: Congo DR celeb vs Uzbekistan [1296x729]
images.caption: Yoane Wissa celebrates with teammates after scoring Congo DR's third goal against Uzbekistan.
images.alt: Yoane Wissa #20 of Congo DR celebrates with teammates after scoring the team's third goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group K match between Congo DR and Uzbekistan at Atlanta Stadium on June 27, 2026 in Atlanta, Georgia.
images.credit: Sean M. Haffey - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Austria celeb vs Algeria [1296x729]
images.caption: Austria celebrate Sasa Kalajdzic's late equalizing goal against Algeria.
images.alt: asa Kalajdzic #14 of Austria celebrates scoring his team's third goal with teammates during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group J match between Algeria and Austria at Kansas City Stadium on June 27, 2026 in Kansas City, Missouri.
images.credit: Kyle Rivas - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Messi celeb vs Jordan [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi celebrates his latest record-breaking goal in Argentina's match with Jordan.
images.alt: Argentina's Lionel Messi (10) celebrates scoring his side's 3rd goal during the World Cup Group J soccer match between Jordan and Argentina in Arlington, Texas, near Dallas, Saturday, June 27, 2026.

article.headline: Australia clinch knockout berth with Paraguay also likely to advance
article.description: Australia and Paraguay played to a 0-0 draw Thursday night in a result that clinched a spot in the knockout round of the World Cup for the Socceroos and will likely be enough for the Paraguayans to advance.
article.linkText: Australia advance with Paraguay likely to join

article.story:
Australia and Paraguay played to a 0-0 draw Thursday night in a result that clinched a spot in the knockout round of the World Cup for the Socceroos and will likely be enough for the Paraguayans to advance.

The expanded tournament to 48 teams that provides a spot in the knockout round for eight of the 12 third-place teams in the group stage led to the cautious approach for both teams in their final Group D match after they each entered with three points thanks to wins over Türkiye.

- Pulisic subs on as Türkiye beats U.S. on last kick
- How can teams qualify for knockout rounds?
- FIFA World Cup match schedule

The winner of this game was assured second place behind the United States in the group with Australia also clinching that spot with a draw thanks to a better goal differential than Paraguay. But the draw that gave Paraguay four points in the group also was likely to be enough barring a string of bad results in the final two days of group play.

"We tried to win the game," Australia coach Tony Popovic said. "In the end, a draw was enough for both nations. Congratulations to Paraguay as well. ... I'm sure as we are feeling euphoria and joy as a nation, I'm sure Paraguay is as well."

This marks the third time that Australia have advanced to the knockout round after losing in the round of 16 in 2006 and 2022. The Socceroos will play in the round of 32 on July 3 in Arlington, Texas, against the second-place finisher from Group G that will be determined Friday night.

"We really did work hard for this moment and I think we should enjoy it," midfielder Ajdin Hrustic said.

Paraguay must wait to learn their fate, but are in good position to advance to the knockout round for the fifth time.

"Now we have to wait," coach Gustavo Alfaro said. "I am optimistic that we will be able to move on to the next phase."

The Socceroos had the best chances in the first half, but Paraguay goalkeeper Orlando Gill stopped an early attempt from Jackson Irvine and then made another save in stoppage time against Cristian Volpato.

The cautious play continued in the second half when Paraguay did have more possession than in the opening 45 minutes but neither team came close to scoring. Jordan Bos had the best chance for Australia in the 90th minute, but his shot went wide from the right side of the box.

Patrick Beach then made a save for Australia on a low shot by Maurício that lacked power in stoppage time.

"You can have opinions on how the game was played or what we both thought we needed," Popovic said. "We at no stage felt we were playing for a draw. I felt we controlled the game quite well, were in control and had the better opportunities. We just gave one away at the end from the edge of the box, which was a heart in the mouth moment unfortunately for us."

Popovic made six changes to his lineup for the game, including giving 18-year-old Lucas Herrington his first World Cup appearance. Herrington, who plays for the Colorado Rapids in MLS, became the youngest Aussie to appear in a World Cup game.

Paraguay midfielder Diego Gómez got his second yellow card of group play and will miss the round of 32 if the team advances.

"We wanted a positive result, but it couldn't be done," Gómez said. "There is a lot to work on, [lots] to get done, lots of things to improve on."

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: wonContest
stats.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

stats.name: finalThirdEntries
stats.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside the final third into the final third

stats.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside to inside the penalty area

stats.name: progressiveCarries
stats.description: Carries that significantly move the ball toward the opponent’s goal

stats.name: successfulFinalThirdPasses
stats.description: Total number of successful passes where the ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

stats.name: totalFinalThirdPasses
stats.description: Total number of passes (successful or unsuccessful) where ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

stats.name: touchesInOppBox
stats.description: Total touches inside the penalty area of the opposition

stats.name: blockedShots
stats.description: The number shots blocked by a defender.

stats.name: effectiveClearance
stats.description: The number of clearances that stops the attack of the opposing team.

stats.description: The number of tackles where the player wins the ball.

stats.name: inneffectiveTackles
stats.description: The number of tackles where the player doesn't win the ball.

stats.name: interceptions
stats.description: The number of interceptions.

stats.description: The perencentage of tackles where the player wins the ball.

stats.description: The number of clearances attempted.

stats.name: possWonAtt3rd
stats.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the attacking third of the field

stats.name: possWonMid3rd
stats.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the midfield third of the field

stats.name: ballRecovery
stats.description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball, or switch of possession between teams when the ball is in open play

stats.name: timesTackled
stats.description: The total number of times a player has been tackled.

stats.name: defensiveInterventions
stats.description: The sum of ball recoveries, won tackles, effective clearances, outfielder blocks, blocked crosses, and defensive third duels won.

stats.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

stats.description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

stats.description: The average user rating for a player.

stats.name: dnp
stats.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

stats.name: draws
stats.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

stats.description: The number of own goals conceded.

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: aerialsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

stats.name: aerialDuelPct
stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

stats.name: totalContest
